nasb.text: since Abraham will surely become a great and mighty nation, and in him all the nations of the earth will be blessed?

esv.text: seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕必要成為強大興盛的國，地上的萬國，都必因他得福。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕必成为强盛的大国，世上万国必因他而蒙福。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕必定成为又大又强的国，地上万国都必因他而蒙福。
